creator: realhuang@kkbox.com
text:
Hi,

You can try to "sudo /usr/local/etc/rc.d/xymon-server restart" , the "mail
from" well change to "root" .

I use /usr/local/libexec/nullmailer/sendmail MTA.


2013/10/23 Real huang <realhuang@kkbox.com>

> Xymon rc script update
>
